name: marketing_skills_for_AI_agents
description: Provides marketing related skills and capabilities tailored for Claude Code and AI agents, covering conversion rate optimization, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.

inputs.name: marketing_goals
inputs.description: Description of the marketing objectives or challenges to address.

inputs.name: content_data
inputs.description: Marketing copy or content that needs optimization or analysis.

inputs.name: website_url
inputs.description: URL of the website for which SEO and analytics insights are required.

inputs.name: analytics_data
inputs.description: Collected metrics from marketing campaigns or web analytics tools for analysis.

outputs.name: optimized_copy
outputs.description: Refined or generated marketing copy aimed at improving engagement and conversions.

outputs.name: seo_recommendations
outputs.description: Actionable SEO strategies and improvements tailored to the website content and structure.

outputs.name: conversion_insights
outputs.description: Data-driven analysis and recommendations to increase conversion rates.

outputs.name: growth_strategies
outputs.description: Suggested approaches and engineering tactics to drive marketing growth.

steps: Input marketing goals and existing content or data into the agent.
Apply copywriting models to generate or optimize marketing text.
Perform SEO analysis including keyword and site audit to identify improvements.
Analyze collected analytics data for trends and bottlenecks in conversions.
Synthesize insights and generate actionable recommendations for growth.
Output optimized marketing materials and strategic plans.
use_cases: Enhancing advertising copy effectiveness with AI-generated suggestions.
Conducting SEO audits and improving website ranking via automated recommendations.
Leveraging analytics data to identify and increase conversion rates.
Creating scalable growth strategies using marketing data and AI agents.
Supporting AI agents like Claude Code in executing marketing tasks autonomously.

prompt_templates.name: copywriting_optimization
prompt_templates.template: Improve this marketing copy for higher engagement and conversion: {content_data}

prompt_templates.name: seo_analysis_request
prompt_templates.template: Analyze the SEO performance of the following website and suggest improvements: {website_url}

prompt_templates.name: conversion_rate_insights
prompt_templates.template: Given the following analytics data, provide insights to improve conversion rates: {analytics_data}

prompt_templates.name: growth_strategy_planning
prompt_templates.template: Suggest growth engineering strategies based on these marketing goals: {marketing_goals}
